title: Concrete fix: route hot-restart completion to Telegram origin + resolve boot session target
summary: Replace hardcoded boot-startup routing with deterministic session resolution, and persist Telegram-origin restart intent so post-restart completion is always delivered back to Telegram when restart was triggered there.

affectedFiles.description: Add concrete restart-origin fields and extend proposal restart helper signature/payload
Add deterministic session resolver, remove hardcoded boot-startup targets, and enforce Telegram-origin restart confirmation routing

diffPreview:
lifecycle.ts
- interface RestartContext { ... previousSessionId?: string; }
+ interface RestartContext { ... previousSessionId?: string; originChannel?: 'web'|'telegram'|'api'|'unknown'; respondToTelegram?: boolean; }

- buildAndRestartForProposal(proposal, previousSessionId?)
+ buildAndRestartForProposal(proposal, previousSessionId?, options?)
+ pass originChannel/respondToTelegram into buildAndRestart payload

boot.ts
+ function resolveBootSessionId(workspacePath, preferredSessionId?) { ... }
- restartCtx.previousSessionId || 'boot-startup'
+ resolveBootSessionId(workspacePath, restartCtx.previousSessionId)
+ if restartCtx telegram-origin => extra handleChat call instructing Telegram confirmation
- cold boot session 'boot-startup'
+ cold boot session resolveBootSessionId(workspacePath)
estimatedImpact: Hot-restart confirmations become channel-correct for Telegram-triggered restarts; boot/restart summaries consistently route to real interactive sessions, eliminating hidden startup messages and reducing operator confusion.
executorPrompt: Apply the proposal exactly as written using precise source edits in src/gateway/lifecycle.ts and src/gateway/boot.ts. Do not introduce conceptual or approximate substitutions. After edits, run npm run build. If successful, stop. If build fails, report exact compiler errors and file:line references.
